name: C-13 merge warns when an operator entry overrides a bundled framework id per the architecture
command:
printf -- '- id: soc2-tsc
  url: https://b.com
' > bundled.yaml && printf -- '- id: soc2-tsc
  url: https://operator.com
  why_authoritative: company override
' > operator.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/merge-registry.sh" --operator operator.yaml --emit merged.yaml --bundled bundled.yaml 2>err.txt && grep -qiE 'warn|overrid' err.txt && echo warned 1>&2
